items.name: Seasoned Beef Entrails Hot Pot
items.description: Includes:   -Special Seafood Pancake   -Spicy Salmon Salad   -BBQ Prime Rib (3 Pcs)   -Deep-fried Shrimp in Spicy Sauce   -Special Crab Hot Pot (Fresh Crab, Clam, Prawns)
items.simplified_description: A hot pot with beef entrails, seafood pancake, spicy salmon salad, BBQ ribs, shrimp, and crab.

items.name: BBQ Combo A
items.description: Includes:   -Deep-fried Dumpling (6 Pcs)  -Seafood Pancake or Clear Noodle or Spicy Rice Cake  -Marinated Beef Rib (1 Pc)   -Marinated Beef Bulgogi   -Marinated Chicken Bulgogi   -Marinated Pork Bulgogi   -Pork Bone Soup or Dumpling Soup
items.simplified_description: Combo with dumplings, seafood pancake or noodles, various marinated meats, and soup.

items.name: BBQ Combo B
items.description: Includes:   -Deep-fried Dumpling (6 Pcs)  -Seafood Pancake or Clear Noodle or Spicy Rice Cake  -Premium Beef Rib (1 Pc)  -Sirloin Beef  -Sliced Pork Belly  -Pork Shoulder Loin  -Pork Bone Soup or Dumpling Soup
items.simplified_description: Combo with dumplings, seafood pancake or noodles, premium beef, pork cuts, and soup.

items.name: BBQ Combo C
items.description: Includes:   -Deep-fried Dumpling (6 Pcs)  -Seafood Pancake or Clear Noodle or Spicy Rice Cake  -Marinated Pork Rib  -Marinated Pork Bulgogi  -Sliced Pork Belly  -Pork Shoulder Loin  -Kimchi Stew or Miso Stew
items.simplified_description: Combo with dumplings, seafood pancake or noodles, marinated pork, and kimchi or miso stew.

items.name: BBQ Combo for 6
items.description: Includes:   -Seaweed Soup or Dumpling Soup   -Seafood Pancake or Clear Noodle with Seafood   -Hamul Jjim or Spicy Rice Cake  -Marinated Beef Rib (2 Pcs)  -Marinated Beef Bulgogi   -Marinated Chicken Bulgogi   -Marinated Pork Bulgogi
items.simplified_description: Large combo with soups, seafood pancake or noodles, steamed seafood, and marinated meats.
